testcase.name: test_full_job_lifecycle_and_pdf

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing section problem_solution assert 'problem_solution' in {'problem_statement': 'Early-stage founders consistently struggle to articulate their startup ideas in a structured, investor-ready format, wasting days or weeks on business planning instead of building. Most lack access to experienced strategists or business architects, and generic templates produce shallow, unconvincing documents. With venture capital competition intensifying and accelerator application cycles shortening, founders need to move from raw idea to polished blueprint in minutes, not weeks. TEST_PytestCo solves this by deploying an AI copilot that transforms unstructured founder input into a comprehensive, actionable business blueprint in under 60 seconds.', 'business_objectives': ['Acquire 1,000 paying subscribers within the first 6 months post-launch by targeting early-stage founder communities on Product Hunt and indie hacker forums.', 'Achieve a monthly recurring revenue (MRR) of $50,000 by the end of month 12 through tiered subscription pricing.', 'Maintain a blueprint generation success rate of 95% or higher, measured by user-rated output quality scores of 4+ out of 5.', 'Reduce average time-to-blueprint for founders from an industry baseline of 3 days to under...rowth, and support.', 'Brand trust must be built from scratch in a skeptical investor and founder ecosystem.', 'Blueprints require founder customization; AI output alone may not satisfy sophisticated investors.'], 'opportunities': ['Rapidly growing global startup ecosystem with millions of new founders annually seeking tools.', 'Expanding LLM capabilities will enable richer, more accurate blueprint outputs over time.', 'Accelerator and university partnerships can unlock large, captive cohorts of target users.', 'Adjacent product expansion into pitch decks, financial models, and investor CRM tools.', 'International markets with underserved founder communities present significant untapped growth.'], 'threats': ['OpenAI, Notion AI, or established SaaS tools could launch competing blueprint features.', 'Rapid commoditization of AI writing tools may erode perceived differentiation and pricing power.', 'Founders may distrust AI-generated strategic documents for high-stakes investor presentations.', 'Economic downturns reducing venture activity could shrink the addressable startup ecosystem.', 'Data privacy concerns if founders share sensitive business ideas with an AI platform.']}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_blueprint_api.py:92: in test_full_job_lifecycle_and_pdf assert key in bp_content, f"Missing section {key}" E AssertionError: Missing section problem_solution E assert 'problem_solution' in {'problem_statement': 'Early-stage founders consistently struggle to articulate their startup ideas in a structured, investor-ready format, wasting days or weeks on business planning instead of building. Most lack access to experienced strategists or business architects, and generic templates produce shallow, unconvincing documents. With venture capital competition intensifying and accelerator application cycles shortening, founders need to move from raw idea to polished blueprint in minutes, not weeks. TEST_PytestCo solves this by deploying an AI copilot that transforms unstructured founder input into a comprehensive, actionable business blueprint in under 60 seconds.', 'business_objectives': ['Acquire 1,000 paying subscribers within the first 6 months post-launch by targeting early-stage founder communities on Product Hunt and indie hacker forums.', 'Achieve a monthly recurring revenue (MRR) of $50,000 by the end of month 12 through tiered subscription pricing.', 'Maintain a blueprint generation success rate of 95% or higher, measured by user-rated output quality scores of 4+ out of 5.', 'Reduce average time-to-blueprint for founders from an industry baseline of 3 days to under...rowth, and support.', 'Brand trust must be built from scratch in a skeptical investor and founder ecosystem.', 'Blueprints require founder customization; AI output alone may not satisfy sophisticated investors.'], 'opportunities': ['Rapidly growing global startup ecosystem with millions of new founders annually seeking tools.', 'Expanding LLM capabilities will enable richer, more accurate blueprint outputs over time.', 'Accelerator and university partnerships can unlock large, captive cohorts of target users.', 'Adjacent product expansion into pitch decks, financial models, and investor CRM tools.', 'International markets with underserved founder communities present significant untapped growth.'], 'threats': ['OpenAI, Notion AI, or established SaaS tools could launch competing blueprint features.', 'Rapid commoditization of AI writing tools may erode perceived differentiation and pricing power.', 'Founders may distrust AI-generated strategic documents for high-stakes investor presentations.', 'Economic downturns reducing venture activity could shrink the addressable startup ecosystem.', 'Data privacy concerns if founders share sensitive business ideas with an AI platform.']}, ...}
